title: bidens ferulifolia var. ludens
intro: Bidens ferulifolia var. ludens, also known as False Daisy, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, characterized by its daisy-like appearance and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bidens ferulifolia var. ludens include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, and can be used to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
